offer: For law firms processing 5–15 legal filings/month, late submissions cause penalties and loss of client trust. We ensure timely filings instead of manual tracking of filing deadlines.
problem: Late submissions of legal documents can lead to penalties and loss of client trust.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for legal professionals
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on legal tools
DM outreach to law firms with demo video
Participate in legal forums sharing best practices
try_it: Let users try deadline reminders and document tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with clear CTA
Develop a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early access to first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
